title: Entity Management - Record Events
description: JSON Schema definitions for Entity Management domain record CRUD events. These events are published via SNS when records are created, updated, or deleted through the RecordManager. This is the highest-volume event type as every data mutation across all entities flows through the Entity Management service.

eventType.description: Event type identifier following the {domain}.{entity}.{action} naming convention.

correlationId.description: UUID for distributed tracing and request correlation. Enables idempotent event processing and deduplication across consumers.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the event was emitted.

source.description: Service name that emitted the event. Always 'entity-management' for record events.

version.description: Schema version for this event definition.

data.description: Domain-specific event payload. Structure varies per event type.

oneOf.title: Record Created Event
oneOf.description: Published after a record is successfully created in any entity. Replaces the synchronous IErpPostCreateRecordHook.OnPostCreateRecord(entityName, record) invocation pattern from RecordHookManager.

data.description: Payload for the record created event. Derived from RecordManager.CreateRecord which invokes ExecutePostCreateRecordHooks(entityName, record).

entityName.description: System name of the entity the record belongs to. Matches the entityName parameter from IErpPostCreateRecordHook.OnPostCreateRecord.

recordId.description: Unique identifier of the created record.

record.description: Full record data as key-value pairs. Matches the dynamic EntityRecord dictionary (IDictionary<string,object>) which contains schema-less properties defined by the entity's field definitions.

createdBy.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the record.

oneOf.title: Record Updated Event
oneOf.description: Published after a record is successfully updated in any entity. Replaces the synchronous IErpPostUpdateRecordHook.OnPostUpdateRecord(entityName, record) invocation pattern from RecordHookManager.

data.description: Payload for the record updated event. Derived from RecordManager.UpdateRecord which invokes ExecutePostUpdateRecordHooks(entityName, record).

entityName.description: System name of the entity the record belongs to. Matches the entityName parameter from IErpPostUpdateRecordHook.OnPostUpdateRecord.

recordId.description: Unique identifier of the updated record.

record.description: Updated record data as key-value pairs. Matches the dynamic EntityRecord dictionary (IDictionary<string,object>) containing the full current state of the record after the update.

changedProperties.description: List of property keys that were modified in this update. Enables consumers to selectively react to changes in specific fields without diffing the entire record.

updatedBy.description: Unique identifier of the user who updated the record.

oneOf.title: Record Deleted Event
oneOf.description: Published after a record is successfully deleted from any entity. Replaces the synchronous IErpPostDeleteRecordHook.OnPostDeleteRecord(entityName, record) invocation pattern from RecordHookManager.

data.description: Payload for the record deleted event. Derived from RecordManager.DeleteRecord which invokes ExecutePostDeleteRecordHooks(entityName, record).

entityName.description: System name of the entity the record was deleted from. Matches the entityName parameter from IErpPostDeleteRecordHook.OnPostDeleteRecord.

recordId.description: Unique identifier of the deleted record.

deletedBy.description: Unique identifier of the user who deleted the record.
